findings.headline: ChatGPT Projects now supports richer source linking for recurring work
findings.summary: Projects can hold linked sources and reusable notes, making recurring research loops easier for solo operators.
findings.at_home_use: Use one project per client niche to track ongoing updates without rebuilding context every session.

findings.headline: Make improved AI workflow handling for files and step reasoning
findings.summary: The platform continues to improve file-aware workflows and better visibility into agent behavior.
findings.at_home_use: Automate lead intake docs and routing with low-code scenarios.

summaries.summary: The strongest practical signal is better persistence and automation control for solo AI workflows.
summaries.top_takeaway: Use persistent context plus automation together instead of isolated prompts.

summaries.section: Key Things to Watch Going Forward
summaries.summary: Watch connector reliability, pricing pressure, and how fast safety controls become standard.

watchlist.item_trend: Persistent project memory as a solo operating layer
watchlist.why_watched: If persistent project context stays reliable, it can reduce repeated setup work for recurring research.
watchlist.what_needs_confirmation: Connector reliability and sustained quality over longer usage windows.

foundationalTools.core_use_case: Build lightweight client dashboards and portals quickly.
foundationalTools.why_foundational: Fast way to turn data and workflows into client-facing UI.

foundationalTools.core_use_case: Automate multi-step operations with file-aware agents.
foundationalTools.why_foundational: Strong for repeatable task chains and integrations.
